name_en: Museum of Fine Arts of Reims

phrases.cultural_note: Entry is free for permanent collections. The museum is housed in a former abbey and has an excellent collection of 13th–20th century works.
The Musée des Beaux-Arts in Reims hosts rotating temporary exhibitions.

responses.english: On the first floor, to the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the highlights of the collection are
phrases.text_local: Quels sont les chefs-d'œuvre du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son lay shay-DUV-ruh doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: Reims' Musée des Beaux-Arts is housed in a former abbey and holds an exceptional collection of David's Death of Marat and 27 Cranach portraits.

responses.english: The Cranachs, David's Marat and the Flemish paintings.
responses.phonetic: lay krah-NAHK, luh dah-VEED duh mah-RAH ay lay TWAL flah-MAHND.
responses.local: Les Cranach, le David de Marat et les toiles flamandes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum is free on the first Sunday of the month
phrases.text_local: Le musée est-il gratuit le premier dimanche du mois ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh moo-ZAY ay-TEEL grah-TWEE luh pruh-MYAY dee-MAHNSH doo MWAH

responses.english: Yes, free on the first Sunday each month.
responses.phonetic: wee, grah-TWEE luh pruh-MYAY dee-MAHNSH shahk MWAH.
responses.local: Oui, gratuit le premier dimanche chaque mois.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the café or tearoom is
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un café ou un salon de thé dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn kah-FAY oo uhn sah-LON duh TAY dahn luh moo-ZAY

responses.english: There's no café, but a garden for picnicking.
responses.phonetic: eel nee ah pah duh kah-FAY, may zuhn zhar-DAN poor peek-nee-KAY.
responses.local: Il n'y a pas de café, mais un jardin pour pique-niquer.
